requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling for Lighting (Zimbabwe energy-label programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明能效标签（津巴布韦能效标签计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明能效標籤（辛巴威能效標籤計劃）

summary.en: Where Zimbabwe operates an energy-efficiency labelling programme for lighting products, LED lamps and luminaires placed on the market are expected to display the applicable energy-efficiency label and meet any associated minimum performance criteria. Zimbabwe does not operate the EU Ecodesign Regulation; instead, energy efficiency is addressed through SAZ-administered performance standards (commonly IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED-lamp performance and IEC 62722-2-1 for LED luminaire performance, as adopted in the ZWS set) and any national or regional energy-labelling scheme (for example schemes aligned with SADC / regional appliance-labelling initiatives and supported by ZERA energy programmes). The specific label format, efficacy thresholds (lm/W), and registration steps must be confirmed with SAZ, ZERA, and the in-country importer, as a mandatory horizontal energy label is not a single fixed EU-style regime.
summary.zh: 若津巴布韦对照明产品实行能效标签计划，则在市场销售的 LED 灯及灯具应展示适用的能效标签并满足任何相关的最低性能准则。津巴布韦不实行欧盟生态设计法规；能效改为通过 SAZ 管理的性能标准（常见为自镇流 LED 灯性能的 IEC 62612 及 LED 灯具性能的 IEC 62722-2-1，按 ZWS 体系采纳）及任何国家或区域能效标签方案（例如与 SADC / 区域电器标签倡议对齐并由 ZERA 能源计划支持的方案）处理。具体标签格式、光效阈值（lm/W）及注册步骤须与 SAZ、ZERA 及在地进口商确认，因强制性横向能效标签并非单一固定的欧盟式制度。
summary.zht: 若辛巴威對照明產品實行能效標籤計劃，則在市場銷售的 LED 燈及燈具應展示適用的能效標籤並滿足任何相關的最低性能準則。辛巴威不實行歐盟生態設計法規；能效改為通過 SAZ 管理的性能標準（常見為自鎮流 LED 燈性能的 IEC 62612 及 LED 燈具性能的 IEC 62722-2-1，按 ZWS 體系採納）及任何國家或區域能效標籤方案（例如與 SADC / 區域電器標籤倡議對齊並由 ZERA 能源計劃支持的方案）處理。具體標籤格式、光效閾值（lm/W）及註冊步驟須與 SAZ、ZERA 及在地進口商確認，因強制性橫向能效標籤並非單一固定的歐盟式制度。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 — performance of self-ballasted LED lamps / LED luminaires (adopted by SAZ as ZWS performance standards)
Zimbabwe energy-efficiency labelling programme (SAZ / ZERA; regional / SADC appliance-labelling alignment) — verify current scope with SAZ and ZERA

summary.en: China operates the China Energy Label (中国能效标识) for in-scope products under the Energy Efficiency Labelling Management Measures, with lighting energy-efficiency rating standards such as GB 30255-2019 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED products / self-ballasted LED-lamps), administered by CNIS/SAMR. The China Energy Label uses China-specific efficiency grades and registration with the China Energy Label Centre. The China Energy Label and GB 30255 grading are China-specific and are not recognised under any Zimbabwe energy-labelling programme.
summary.zh: 中国对范围内产品实行中国能效标识，依据《能源效率标识管理办法》执行，照明能效分级标准如 GB 30255-2019（普通照明用 LED 产品 / 自镇流 LED 灯能效限定值及能效等级），由 CNIS/SAMR 管理。中国能效标识采用中国特有的能效等级，并须在中国能效标识中心注册。中国能效标识及 GB 30255 分级为中国特有，不被任何津巴布韦能效标签计划所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對範圍內產品實行中國能效標識，依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》執行，照明能效分級標準如 GB 30255-2019（普通照明用 LED 產品 / 自鎮流 LED 燈能效限定值及能效等級），由 CNIS/SAMR 管理。中國能效標識採用中國特有的能效等級，並須在中國能效標識中心註冊。中國能效標識及 GB 30255 分級為中國特有，不被任何辛巴威能效標籤計劃所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED products (CNIS/SAMR)
China Energy Label (中国能效标识) — Energy Efficiency Labelling Management Measures; China Energy Label Centre registration

gap.en: Note: the EU Ecodesign regime maps, for Zimbabwe, to an energy-LABEL / performance-standard approach rather than a horizontal ecodesign regulation. Gaps: (1) China Energy Label grades (GB 30255) are China-specific and not transferable — efficacy must be demonstrated against the ZWS-adopted performance standards (IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1) and any Zimbabwe label scheme; (2) the existence, format, and mandatory status of a Zimbabwe lighting energy label must be confirmed with SAZ / ZERA — it is not a single fixed EU-style label with a central database like EPREL; (3) efficacy thresholds (lm/W), test conditions, and any minimum-performance entry criteria differ from China's grades and must be re-verified; (4) products should be characterised at 230 V / 50 Hz. There is no EU-style EPREL central registration obligation in Zimbabwe.
gap.zh: 注意：就津巴布韦而言，欧盟生态设计制度映射为能效标签 / 性能标准方式，而非横向生态设计法规。差距：（1）中国能效标识等级（GB 30255）为中国特有且不可转移——光效须依据 ZWS 采纳的性能标准（IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1）及任何津巴布韦标签方案予以证明；（2）津巴布韦照明能效标签是否存在、其格式及强制状态须与 SAZ / ZERA 确认——其并非像 EPREL 那样带中央数据库的单一固定欧盟式标签；（3）光效阈值（lm/W）、检测条件及任何最低性能准入标准与中国等级不同，须重新核验；（4）产品应在 230 V / 50 Hz 下表征。津巴布韦不存在欧盟式 EPREL 中央注册义务。
gap.zht: 注意：就辛巴威而言，歐盟生態設計制度映射為能效標籤 / 性能標準方式，而非橫向生態設計法規。差距：（1）中國能效標識等級（GB 30255）為中國特有且不可轉移——光效須依據 ZWS 採納的性能標準（IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1）及任何辛巴威標籤方案予以證明；（2）辛巴威照明能效標籤是否存在、其格式及強制狀態須與 SAZ / ZERA 確認——其並非像 EPREL 那樣帶中央數據庫的單一固定歐盟式標籤；（3）光效閾值（lm/W）、檢測條件及任何最低性能準入標準與中國等級不同，須重新核驗；（4）產品應在 230 V / 50 Hz 下表徵。辛巴威不存在歐盟式 EPREL 中央註冊義務。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — applicable where a Zimbabwe lighting energy-labelling programme is in force; performance to ZWS-adopted IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 expected. Confirm label format and mandatory status with SAZ / ZERA. No EU-style EPREL central registration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label and GB 30255 energy-efficiency grading required for in-scope LED products in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Zimbabwe, the EU Ecodesign concept maps to an energy-label / performance-standard approach: demonstrate efficacy against the ZWS-adopted IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 and any Zimbabwe lighting energy-labelling programme, characterised at 230 V / 50 Hz. China Energy Label grades (GB 30255) are China-specific and not transferable. Confirm the label format, thresholds, and mandatory status with SAZ and ZERA; there is no EU-style EPREL central registration in Zimbabwe.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就津巴布韦而言，欧盟生态设计概念映射为能效标签/性能标准方式：依据 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 及任何津巴布韦照明能效标签计划证明光效，并在 230 V / 50 Hz 下表征。中国能效标识等级（GB 30255）为中国特有且不可转移。请与 SAZ 及 ZERA 确认标签格式、阈值及强制状态；津巴布韦不存在欧盟式 EPREL 中央注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就辛巴威而言，歐盟生態設計概念映射為能效標籤/性能標準方式：依據 ZWS 採納的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 及任何辛巴威照明能效標籤計劃證明光效，並在 230 V / 50 Hz 下表徵。中國能效標識等級（GB 30255）為中國特有且不可轉移。請與 SAZ 及 ZERA 確認標籤格式、閾值及強制狀態；辛巴威不存在歐盟式 EPREL 中央註冊。

requirement_topic.en: Performance — Efficacy, Lifetime, Colour Rendering, Power Factor (ZWS-adopted IEC performance)
requirement_topic.zh: 性能——光效、寿命、显色性、功率因数（ZWS 采纳的 IEC 性能标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 性能——光效、壽命、顯色性、功率因數（ZWS 採納的 IEC 性能標準）

summary.en: Performance attributes of LED lamps and luminaires for Zimbabwe — luminous efficacy (lm/W), useful lifetime / lumen maintenance, colour rendering index (CRI), correlated colour temperature (CCT), and power factor — are demonstrated against the ZWS-adopted IEC performance standards: IEC 62612 (self-ballasted LED lamps — performance) and IEC 62722-2-1 (LED luminaires — performance). These complement the safety standards (IEC 60598 / IEC 62560) and underpin any energy-label efficacy claim. Where a Zimbabwe energy-labelling programme or a public tender sets minimum efficacy or CRI criteria, the product must meet them; otherwise these are quality/performance expectations rather than a horizontal mandatory ecodesign threshold. Test data should reflect 230 V / 50 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯及灯具的性能属性——光效（lm/W）、有效寿命/光通维持率、显色指数（CRI）、相关色温（CCT）及功率因数——依据 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 性能标准证明：IEC 62612（自镇流 LED 灯——性能）及 IEC 62722-2-1（LED 灯具——性能）。其与安全标准（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）互补，并支撑任何能效标签的光效声称。当津巴布韦能效标签计划或公开招标设定最低光效或 CRI 准则时，产品须满足；否则此为质量/性能预期，而非横向强制生态设计阈值。检测数据应反映 230 V / 50 Hz 运行。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈及燈具的性能屬性——光效（lm/W）、有效壽命/光通維持率、顯色指數（CRI）、相關色溫（CCT）及功率因數——依據 ZWS 採納的 IEC 性能標準證明：IEC 62612（自鎮流 LED 燈——性能）及 IEC 62722-2-1（LED 燈具——性能）。其與安全標準（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）互補，並支撐任何能效標籤的光效聲稱。當辛巴威能效標籤計劃或公開招標設定最低光效或 CRI 準則時，產品須滿足；否則此為質量/性能預期，而非橫向強制生態設計閾值。檢測數據應反映 230 V / 50 Hz 運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (ZWS-adopted)
IEC 62722-2-1 — Luminaire performance — Part 2-1: Particular requirements for LED luminaires (ZWS-adopted)

summary.en: China's performance standards include GB/T 24908 (performance of self-ballasted LED lamps) and GB/T 24823 / GB/T 9473 family for luminaire performance, alongside the GB 30255-2019 energy-efficiency grading used for the China Energy Label. These cover efficacy, lumen maintenance, CRI, CCT, and power factor on a basis broadly comparable to the IEC performance standards, but use China-specific grade boundaries and are tested at 220 V. China GB/T performance reports are not recognised under Zimbabwe's ZWS performance standards or any Zimbabwe energy-label programme.
summary.zh: 中国的性能标准包括 GB/T 24908（自镇流 LED 灯性能）及 GB/T 24823 / GB/T 9473 系列灯具性能标准，连同用于中国能效标识的 GB 30255-2019 能效分级。这些在光效、光通维持率、CRI、CCT 及功率因数方面与 IEC 性能标准大致相当，但采用中国特有的等级边界，且在 220 V 下检测。中国 GB/T 性能报告不被津巴布韦 ZWS 性能标准或任何津巴布韦能效标签计划所认可。
summary.zht: 中國的性能標準包括 GB/T 24908（自鎮流 LED 燈性能）及 GB/T 24823 / GB/T 9473 系列燈具性能標準，連同用於中國能效標識的 GB 30255-2019 能效分級。這些在光效、光通維持率、CRI、CCT 及功率因數方面與 IEC 性能標準大致相當，但採用中國特有的等級邊界，且在 220 V 下檢測。中國 GB/T 性能報告不被辛巴威 ZWS 性能標準或任何辛巴威能效標籤計劃所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services (SAC)
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency grades for LED products (used for China Energy Label)

gap.en: Performance content overlaps with the IEC base, but: (1) China test data is at 220 V — re-characterise efficacy / power factor at 230 V / 50 Hz for Zimbabwe claims; (2) China-specific GB 30255 grade boundaries do not map directly to any Zimbabwe energy-label tier — verify thresholds against the Zimbabwe scheme if one is in force; (3) ZWS-adopted IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 reports from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab are advisable since CN GB/T reports are not recognised by SAZ; (4) absent an active mandatory Zimbabwe efficacy threshold, performance becomes a customer / tender quality criterion rather than a horizontal market-access barrier — confirm whether a specific tender or the energy-label programme imposes minimums.
gap.zh: 性能内容与 IEC 基础重叠，但：（1）中国检测数据为 220 V——为津巴布韦声称应在 230 V / 50 Hz 下重新表征光效/功率因数；（2）中国特有的 GB 30255 等级边界不能直接映射到任何津巴布韦能效标签层级——若有方案在行，须按津巴布韦方案核验阈值；（3）建议提供 ILAC MRA 认可实验室按 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 出具的报告，因中国 GB/T 报告不被 SAZ 认可；（4）在无现行强制津巴布韦光效阈值的情况下，性能成为客户/招标质量准则而非横向市场准入壁垒——须确认具体招标或能效标签计划是否设定最低值。
gap.zht: 性能內容與 IEC 基礎重疊，但：（1）中國檢測數據為 220 V——為辛巴威聲稱應在 230 V / 50 Hz 下重新表徵光效/功率因數；（2）中國特有的 GB 30255 等級邊界不能直接映射到任何辛巴威能效標籤層級——若有方案在行，須按辛巴威方案核驗閾值；（3）建議提供 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室按 ZWS 採納的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 出具的報告，因中國 GB/T 報告不被 SAZ 認可；（4）在無現行強制辛巴威光效閾值的情況下，性能成為客戶/招標質量準則而非橫向市場准入壁壘——須確認具體招標或能效標籤計劃是否設定最低值。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — performance to ZWS-adopted IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 expected; binding only where a Zimbabwe energy-label programme or tender sets minimum efficacy / CRI criteria — otherwise a quality expectation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (energy grade) — GB 30255-2019 minimum efficiency and China Energy Label apply to in-scope LED products; GB/T performance standards are recommended

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED performance (efficacy, lifetime, CRI, CCT, power factor) for Zimbabwe should be demonstrated against the ZWS-adopted IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 at 230 V / 50 Hz. China GB/T 24908 / GB 30255 data is at 220 V with China-specific grades and is not recognised by SAZ. Minimum performance is binding only where a Zimbabwe energy-label programme or tender imposes it; otherwise it is a quality expectation — confirm with SAZ / ZERA / the buyer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的 LED 性能（光效、寿命、CRI、CCT、功率因数）应依据 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 在 230 V / 50 Hz 下证明。中国 GB/T 24908 / GB 30255 数据为 220 V 且采用中国特有等级，不被 SAZ 认可。最低性能仅在津巴布韦能效标签计划或招标设定时具约束力；否则为质量预期——请与 SAZ / ZERA / 买方确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的 LED 性能（光效、壽命、CRI、CCT、功率因數）應依據 ZWS 採納的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62722-2-1 在 230 V / 50 Hz 下證明。中國 GB/T 24908 / GB 30255 數據為 220 V 且採用中國特有等級，不被 SAZ 認可。最低性能僅在辛巴威能效標籤計劃或招標設定時具約束力；否則為質量預期——請與 SAZ / ZERA / 買方確認。
